# GitHub Discussions Setup

This document outlines the GitHub Discussions configuration for the RadTempCF project.

## Enabling GitHub Discussions

GitHub Discussions is already enabled on this repository. To enable it:

1. Go to repository **Settings**
2. Click **Discussions** in the left sidebar
3. Enable **Enable Discussions**

## Discussion Categories

| Category | Description | Admin Only |
|----------|-------------|-------------|
| **Announcements** | Project updates, releases, important notices | Yes |
| **Q&A** | General questions and answers | No |
| **General** | General discussion about the project | No |
| **Ideas** | Feature suggestions and ideas | No |
| **Show and Tell** | Share your projects, templates, integrations | No |

## Best Practices

- Search before posting to avoid duplicates
- Use appropriate categories for your posts
- Be respectful and follow the Code of Conduct
- Mark helpful answers as accepted solutions
- Use GitHub Issues for bug reports and feature requests

## Moderation Team

The following members are responsible for moderating discussions:
- Project Maintainers (@ OWNERS)
- Community Managers

## Getting Help

- For quick questions: Use **Q&A** category
- For feature requests: Use **Ideas** category
- For showing your work: Use **Show and Tell** category
